src: This is an official implementation for PROMPT-CAM: A Simpler Interpretable Transformer for Fine-Grained Analysis (CVPR'25). Explore fine-grained trait distinctions between different specified species.
ja: PROMPT-CAM: A Simpler Interpretable Transformer for Fine-Grained Analysis (CVPR'25) の公式実装です。異なる指定種間の細粒度な形質の違いを探索します。
